output.summary: Blends ResFormer value residuals with DenseFormer depth-weighted averaging and score-then-train test-time fine-tuning on validation windows.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Fine-tunes via AdamW on already-scored validation tokens during sliding-window evaluation.
techniques: Value residual blending from layer one into all subsequent layers
DenseFormer depth-weighted averaging replacing U-Net skips
Score-then-train test-time AdamW on validation windows
